title: Encanto
description: The Madrigal family lives in a magical house in the mountains of Colombia, where every child receives a unique magical gift — except Mirabel, who may be the family's last hope.

title: Inside Out
description: When Riley moves to a new city, her emotions — Joy, Sadness, Fear, Anger, and Disgust — struggle to guide her through the transition as core memories and personality islands fall apart.
